commands.review_summary:
This PR updates github/gh-aw-actions setup/setup-cli pins from the v0.74.4 commit to the v0.77.5 commit in the Copilot setup workflow and two generated gh-aw lock workflows.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a dependency update PR, not a reported runtime issue. Source inspection verifies the affected workflow setup-action pins on current main.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is identified; maintainer review should focus on affected workflow checks or a deliberate acceptance of the automation risk.
